ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_EVENT.title: Astral Event
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_EVENT.description: A special card originating from the Astral Party event system.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_STEPS.title: Steps
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_STEPS.description: Steps gained from room entry for [Persona: Bionic Jasmine]. Unassigned, Rest Site, Shop, Treasure, Monster, and Map rooms grant 2. Event rooms grant 3. Elite rooms grant 6. Boss rooms grant 10.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_TEMPORARY.title: Temporary
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_TEMPORARY.descript: Discard this card at the end of turn. This keyword is removed after the card enters the discard pile.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SOLAR_BOMBARDMENT.title: Solar Bombardment
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SOLAR_BOMBARDMENT.descrip: Discard all cards in your hand, then bombard random enemies. Base 3 hits. For every 2 discarded cards, bombard 1 extra time. Base damage is 3 and increases by 1 for every 3 total Energy cost among discarded cards. Discarded 0-cost cards count as 1 Energy, and discarded X-cost cards count as your current Energy.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_MIXED.title: Mixed
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_MIXED.description:
Attack: +1 temporary Strength
Defensive Skill: +1 temporary Dexterity
Skill (no Block): Heal 1 HP
Power: Gain 1 Energy
Status: Draw 1 card
Curse: Heal 1 HP and gain 1 Block
